arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Athletic Bilbao for an intense away game, quite possibly one of the toughest matches left in the team’s LaLiga schedule. Athletic are a very physical team, so Real Madrid will have to respond by matching that level of physicality while also playing with composure in this one.

arts.sum: Real Madrid will ‘abandon’ their hopes of signing Liverpool right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold, according to reports. Real Madrid have now informed Liverpool of their desire to sign Alexander-Arnold, according to talkSPORT .
